advancements.youkaishomecoming.main.alco: Brew and drink an alcoholic drink and obtain Drunk effect
advancements.youkaishomecoming.main.bree: Breed boar with carrot, potato, or beetroot
advancements.youkaishomecoming.main.coff: Plant Coffea on Podzol, Mud, or Soul Soil
advancements.youkaishomecoming.main.crab: Have a crab grab your water bucket when attempting to bucket a crab
advancements.youkaishomecoming.main.cucu: Let cucumber climb ropes and harvest the top cucumber of a 3-block tall cucumber crop
advancements.youkaishomecoming.main.dish: Steam a plate meal or bamboo meal. Note that they heavily obstruct steam.
advancements.youkaishomecoming.main.feed: Feed Reimu all appealing food from Youkai's Homecoming to make her happy and give you her hairband
advancements.youkaishomecoming.main.fore: Make Rainbow Roll Slice and Volcano Roll Slice
advancements.youkaishomecoming.main.grap: Cut the leaves off a mature grape crop so that it can grow larger. Make sure it has 3 ropes in a row to climb onto.
Harvest grape hanging under a grape branch
Get a Sweet Ormosia Mochi Mixed Boiled
advancements.youkaishomecoming.main.kois: Obtain Koishi's Hat after playing with Koishi
advancements.youkaishomecoming.main.lost: When Rumia takes more than 40 damage, she will convert to Ex. Rumia. Defeat Ex. Rumia with danmaku and obtain Rumia's Hairband.
advancements.youkaishomecoming.main.mary: Receives a phone call from Koishi in the nether in Youkaifying effect
advancements.youkaishomecoming.main.max_: Steam an item on the 18th rack
advancements.youkaishomecoming.main.mons: Eat a bowl of flesh feast
advancements.youkaishomecoming.main.pass: Drink until you have maximum Drunk effect
advancements.youkaishomecoming.main.pot_: Use small iron pot to take a serve of food from short pot / stockpot
advancements.youkaishomecoming.main.redb: Plant Red Bean on Coarse Dirt, Mud, or Clay
advancements.youkaishomecoming.main.smal: Cooking with small iron pot / short pot / stockpot
advancements.youkaishomecoming.main.spel: When you eat flesh in front of villagers, Reimu will try to exterminate you. Defeat Reimu and obtain her spellcard
advancements.youkaishomecoming.main.sque: Jump in the basin to squeeze juice out of grapes
advancements.youkaishomecoming.main.sush: Make Otoro Nigiri, Lorelei Nigiri, Tobiko Gunkan, and Rainbow Futomaki Slice
advancements.youkaishomecoming.main.suwa: Obtain Suwako's Hat after collecting enough faith
In youkaified or youkaifying effect, give the straw hat to a frog
advancements.youkaishomecoming.main.tea_: Collect tea leaves before tea crop starts flowering
Drink all kinds of tea in original flavor
advancements.youkaishomecoming.main.trad: In youkaified effect, trade with Rumia to get Danmaku
advancements.youkaishomecoming.main.udum: Plants an Udumbara with its leaves. It grows under moonlight and shrinks under sunlight.
Get an Udumbara flower. It will only appear for 10 seconds during full moon.
Harvest Udumbara Leaves from Udumbara crop near maturity

effect.youkaishomecoming.drunk.desc: Increase attack damage, but you feel drunk. You can't have sobering drink while having this effect. Drunk effect can stack up to 5 layers.
effect.youkaishomecoming.drunk.descripti: Increase attack damage, but you feel drunk. You can't have sobering drink while having this effect. Drunk effect can stack up to 5 layers.
effect.youkaishomecoming.fairy.desc: You are fairy-fied. Reduces max health and attack damage, but increases movement speed.
effect.youkaishomecoming.fairy.descripti: You are fairy-fied. Reduces max health and attack damage, but increases movement speed.
effect.youkaishomecoming.higi.desc: Increases attack damage and movement speed, and regenerates health periodically.
effect.youkaishomecoming.higi.descriptio: Increases attack damage and movement speed, and regenerates health periodically.
effect.youkaishomecoming.phantom.desc: Prevents vibration from you and your projectiles. Warps you to the top of the world when falling into the void. Heals every 3 seconds under moonlight. Reduced damage taken when under full moon.
effect.youkaishomecoming.phantom.descrip: Prevents vibration from you and your projectiles. Warps you to the top of the world when falling into the void. Heals every 3 seconds under moonlight. Reduced damage taken when under full moon.
effect.youkaishomecoming.refreshing.desc: Immune to fire, puts down fire
Immune to fire, puts down fire
effect.youkaishomecoming.smoothing.desc: Immune to poison, improves health regeneration
effect.youkaishomecoming.smoothing.descr: Immune to poison, improves health regeneration
effect.youkaishomecoming.sober.desc: Prevents phantom spawn, nausea, youkaization, and sleep. You can't have another alcohol or sobering drink while having this effect.
effect.youkaishomecoming.sober.descripti: Prevents phantom spawn, nausea, youkaization, and sleep. You can't have another alcohol or sobering drink while having this effect.
effect.youkaishomecoming.tea_polyphenols: Boost attack speed, heal every 3 seconds when under sunlight
Boost attack speed, heal every 3 seconds when under sunlight
effect.youkaishomecoming.thick.desc: Immune to wither, reduces damage by 1
effect.youkaishomecoming.thick.descripti: Immune to wither, reduces damage by 1
effect.youkaishomecoming.unconscious.des: You won't be targeted by mobs. Terminates when you attack or open loot chests.
You won't be targeted by mobs. Terminates when you attack or open loot chests.
effect.youkaishomecoming.youkaified.desc: You are youkaified. Increases max health, attack damage, and movement speed, but you need more food.
You are youkaified. Increases max health, attack damage, and movement speed, but you need more food.
effect.youkaishomecoming.youkaifying.des: You are being youkaified. Consuming more flesh food accelerates the process.
You are being youkaified. Consuming more flesh food accelerates the process.
youkaishomecoming.configuration.danmakuH: When danmaku hits target, heal youkai health by percentage of max health
youkaishomecoming.configuration.danmakuM: Minimum damage youkai danmaku will deal against non-player
youkaishomecoming.configuration.danmakuP: Minimum damage youkai danmaku will deal against player
youkaishomecoming.configuration.enableEx: Enable extra damage cool down on some youkai
youkaishomecoming.configuration.fairyAtt: Fairies will actively attack players with youkaifying/ed effects
youkaishomecoming.configuration.fairySum: Chance for fairies to summon other fairies when killed by non-danmaku damage
youkaishomecoming.configuration.frogEatC: Number of raiders with different types frogs need to eat in front of villager to drop Suwako hat
youkaishomecoming.configuration.frogEatR: Range for villagers without direct sight when frog eat raiders
Range for villagers with direct sight when frog eat raiders
youkaishomecoming.configuration.koishiAt: Number of times player needs to consecutively block Koishi attack to get hat
Chance every tick to do koishi attack
Time in ticks for minimum time between koishi attacks
Enable koishi attack when player has youkaifying or youkaified effect
youkaishomecoming.configuration.reimuSum: If true, eating flesh food near villagers will summon Reimu to attack the player
youkaishomecoming.configuration.rumiaHai: If true, killing EX Rumia with danmaku will drop her hairband
youkaishomecoming.configuration.title: Youkai's Homecoming Configuration
youkaishomecoming.configuration.youkaifi: Duration of Youkaified effect in ticks (20 min = 24000)
Ticks added to Youkaified effect when eating flesh while already youkaified (5 min = 6000)
youkaishomecoming.configuration.youkaify: Chance (out of 100) that flesh food triggers Youkaifying for the first time
Duration of Confusion from youkaification in ticks
Tick threshold of accumulated Youkaifying time before converting to Youkaified (5 min = 6000)
Ticks of Youkaifying effect given by flesh food (1 min = 1200)
youkaishomecoming.info.bed_unbound: This block is not linked to a structure
youkaishomecoming.info.entity_unbound: This character is not linked to a bed
youkaishomecoming.item.obtain_blood: Kill human mobs with knife and have glass bottle in off hand wile being %s
youkaishomecoming.item.obtain_flesh: Kill human mobs with knife while being %s
youkaishomecoming.item.obtain_frozen_fro: Dropped when Cirno freezes a frog.
youkaishomecoming.item.obtain_koishi_hat: Drops when blocking Koishi attacks %s times in a row
youkaishomecoming.item.obtain_reimu_hair: Feed Reimu a variety of food
youkaishomecoming.item.obtain_rumia_hair: Drops when player defeat Ex. Rumia with Danmaku
youkaishomecoming.item.obtain_suwako_hat: Drops when frog with hat eats %s different kinds of raiders in front of villagers
youkaishomecoming.item.usage_cirno_hairb: Shift player towards %s. Your magic damage freezes target (and frogs). Allows using Light Blue danmaku without consumption.
youkaishomecoming.item.usage_fairy_ice: Throw to deal damage and freeze target.
youkaishomecoming.item.usage_fairy_wings: When you are %s, enables creative flight.
youkaishomecoming.item.usage_frozen_frog: Throw toward target to summon a frog.
youkaishomecoming.item.usage_koishi_hat: Grants constant %s. Allows using Blue and Red danmaku without consumption.
youkaishomecoming.item.usage_reimu_hairb: Enables creative flight. Your danmaku damage bypasses magical protection.
youkaishomecoming.item.usage_rumia_hairb: Shift player towards %s. Drops heads when killing mobs. Flesh and blood drops no longer require knife (bonus when still using knife).
youkaishomecoming.item.usage_straw_hat: With %s, you can equip it on frogs to allow them to eat raiders
youkaishomecoming.item.usage_suwako_hat: Grants constant %s. Allows using Cyan and Lime danmaku without consumption.
youkaishomecoming.item.wand_block: Click block to show structure bounds
youkaishomecoming.item.wand_character: Click character to reset global character data for you
youkaishomecoming.item.wand_structure: Sneak-click block to show structure option screen
youkaishomecoming.msg.reimu_flesh: Reimu: You shall not eat it. Last warning.
youkaishomecoming.msg.reimu_warn: Reimu: Drink some tea and keep your sanity. Last warning.
youkaishomecoming.no_consume_2: Allows using %s and %s danmaku without consumption.
youkaishomecoming.tab.title: Gensokyo Roles
youkaishomecoming.title: Youkai's Homecoming
